clusters.title: Search Underway for Missing US Airman After Jet Shot Down in Iran
clusters.summary: A US fighter jet was shot down over Iran, marking the first instance of enemy fire downing a US military aircraft in over two decades. US and Iranian forces are currently engaged in a search operation for the missing crew member. This incident raises significant concerns regarding escalating tensions in the region and the safety of military personnel.

clusters.title: Artemis II Crew Captures Stunning Earth Images on Moon Journey
clusters.summary: The Artemis II crew, aboard the Orion capsule, has shared stunning images of Earth as they progress on their mission towards the Moon. Commander Reid Wiseman captured the photos, marking a significant milestone in NASA's lunar exploration efforts. This mission aims to pave the way for future crewed lunar landings and further space exploration.

clusters.title: Supreme Court Hears Arguments on Ending Birthright Citizenship
clusters.summary: The Supreme Court recently heard arguments regarding the Trump administration's push to end birthright citizenship, which the administration claims is being exploited through birth tourism. During the proceedings, justices expressed skepticism about the legal basis for the proposed change. This case has significant implications for immigration policy and citizenship rights in the United States.
